rulings.Case Title: HWA 555 OWNERS, LLC, A DELAWARE VS. RGN-SAN FRANCISCO XXIV, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF HWA 555 OWNERS, LLC, A DELAWARE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to November 17, 2020 to be heard with other pending motions. No later than November 13, 2020 parties to file a joint supplemental brief advising the Court of the results of the settlement conference scheduled for November 10, 2020. = (501/CFH)
